query: INSERT INTO independent_study_modules (title, titleSwahili, category, description, descriptionSwahili, content, contentSwahili, language, estimatedHours, isPublished, `order`) VALUES ('FMC Origins and Founder', 'Asili za Kanisa la Wakristo wa Metodisti Wenye Akili Huru', 'history', 'Learn about John Wesley and the Free Methodist Church founding principles', 'Jifunze kuhusu John Wesley na kanuni za msingi za Kanisa la Wakristo wa Metodisti Wenye Akili Huru', 'John Wesley was an English clergyman born in 1703. He started a movement called Methodism because he believed in a methodical approach to Christian living. The Free Methodist Church was founded in 1860 by Benjamin Titus Roberts and other Methodist leaders who believed in freedom from slavery, freedom in worship, and freedom for the poor. Key principles include simplicity, holiness, social concern, and evangelism.', 'John Wesley alikuwa mkazi wa Kiingereza aliyezaliwa mwaka 1703. Alianza harakati inayoitwa Methodism kwa sababu alimwamini katika njia ya methodical ya kuishi maisha ya Kikristo. Kanisa la Wakristo wa Metodisti Wenye Akili Huru lilianzishwa mwaka 1860 na Benjamin Titus Roberts na viongozi wengine wa Methodism ambao walimwamini katika uhuru kutoka utumwaji, uhuru katika ibada, na uhuru kwa walio maskini.', 'bilingual', 2, 1, 1); INSERT INTO independent_study_modules (title, titleSwahili, category, description, descriptionSwahili, content, contentSwahili, language, estimatedHours, isPublished, `order`) VALUES ('Core Beliefs and Values', 'Imani na Thamani za Msingi', 'polity', 'Understand the core theological beliefs of the Free Methodist Church and how they apply to leadership', 'Elewa imani za msingi za kidini za Kanisa la Wakristo wa Metodisti Wenye Akili Huru na jinsi zinavyotumika katika uongozi', 'The Free Methodist Church believes in the authority of the Bible, salvation through Christ, holiness and holy living, the Holy Spirit power, and social justice and compassion. These beliefs should guide your decisions as a leader.', 'Kanisa la Wakristo wa Metodisti Wenye Akili Huru linaamini katika mamlaka ya Bibilia, wokovu kupitia Kristo, utakatifu na kuishi maisha matakatifu, nguvu ya Roho Mtakatifu, na haki ya kijamii na huruma.', 'bilingual', 3, 1, 2); INSERT INTO independent_study_modules (title, titleSwahili, category, description, descriptionSwahili, content, contentSwahili, language, estimatedHours, isPublished, `order`) VALUES ('Church Organization and Structure', 'Muundo wa Kanisa', 'polity', 'Learn how the Free Methodist Church is organized and how decisions are made', 'Jifunze jinsi Kanisa la Wakristo wa Metodisti Wenye Akili Huru imeundwa na jinsi maamuzi yanafanywa', 'The local church is led by a pastor, church board, committees, and members. Decisions are made through prayer, discussion, discernment, voting, and implementation. This shared leadership approach ensures that decisions reflect the values and wisdom of the entire congregation.', 'Kanisa la ndani linaongezwa na padri, bodi ya kanisa, kamati, na wanachama. Maamuzi yanafanywa kupitia maombi, mijadala, uelewa, kura, na utekelezaji.', 'bilingual', 2.5, 1, 3); INSERT INTO independent_study_modules (title, titleSwahili, category, description, descriptionSwahili, content, contentSwahili, language, estimatedHours, isPublished, `order`) VALUES ('Leadership Roles and Responsibilities', 'Majukumu na Wajibu wa Uongozi', 'polity', 'Understand different leadership roles in the Free Methodist Church', 'Elewa majukumu tofauti ya uongozi katika Kanisa la Wakristo wa Metodisti Wenye Akili Huru', 'Different leadership roles include pastors, church board members, committee leaders, deacons, and lay leaders. Each role has specific responsibilities and required skills. Common challenges for leaders include burnout, conflict, lack of volunteers, financial pressure, and discouragement.', 'Majukumu tofauti ya uongozi ni pamoja na padri, wanachama wa bodi ya kanisa, viongozi wa kamati, wakofi, na viongozi wa kawaida. Kila jukumu lina majukumu mahususi na ujuzi unaohitajika.', 'bilingual', 3, 1, 4);
